case_title: MATTHEW JOSEPH SEGURA (MINOR) et al RESPONDENT VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO RESPONDENT SEGURA       (MINOR), MATTHEW JOSEPH SEGURA     (GUARDIAN), JEFFREY HEARING SET FOR MAY-06-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.
